mapper.select: SELECT l.component_item_id, i.item_code AS component_code, i.item_name AS component_name, l.qty_per, l.uom, l.scrap_rate, CASE WHEN COALESCE(l.is_phantom, 'N') = 'Y' OR COALESCE(i.is_phantom, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS is_phantom FROM t_bom_line l JOIN t_item i ON i.item_id = l.component_item_id WHERE l.bom_id = #{bomId} ORDER BY l.line_no

SELECT l.component_item_id, ci.item_code AS component_code, ci.item_name AS component_name, l.qty_per, l.uom, l.scrap_rate, CASE WHEN COALESCE(l.is_phantom, 'N') = 'Y' OR COALESCE(ci.is_phantom, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS is_phantom FROM t_bom_line l JOIN t_bom_header h ON h.bom_id = l.bom_id JOIN t_item ci ON ci.item_id = l.component_item_id WHERE h.item_id = #{parentItemId} AND h.status = 'ACTIVE' AND h.is_default = 'Y' AND h.effective_from <= #{asOf} AND (h.effective_to IS NULL OR h.effective_to >= #{asOf}) ORDER BY l.line_no

WITH RECURSIVE bom_tree ( lvl, parent_item_id, component_item_id, component_code, component_name, item_type, qty_per, cum_qty, uom, path, is_phantom ) AS ( SELECT 1, h.item_id, l.component_item_id, ci.item_code, ci.item_name, ci.item_type, l.qty_per, ROUND(#{qty} * (l.qty_per / (1 - COALESCE(l.scrap_rate, 0))), 6), l.uom, CONCAT('/', ci.item_code), CASE WHEN COALESCE(l.is_phantom, 'N') = 'Y' OR COALESCE(ci.is_phantom, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM t_bom_line l JOIN t_bom_header h ON h.bom_id = l.bom_id JOIN t_item ci ON ci.item_id = l.component_item_id WHERE h.item_id = #{itemId} AND h.status = 'ACTIVE' AND h.is_default = 'Y' AND h.effective_from <= (SELECT curr_biz_date FROM t_business_date WHERE sys_code = 'CORE') AND (h.effective_to IS NULL OR h.effective_to >= (SELECT curr_biz_date FROM t_business_date WHERE sys_code = 'CORE')) UNION ALL SELECT t.lvl + 1, h.item_id, l.component_item_id, ci.item_code, ci.item_name, ci.item_type, l.qty_per, ROUND(t.cum_qty * (l.qty_per / (1 - COALESCE(l.scrap_rate, 0))), 6), l.uom, CONCAT(t.path, '/', ci.item_code), CASE WHEN COALESCE(l.is_phantom, 'N') = 'Y' OR COALESCE(ci.is_phantom, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM bom_tree t JOIN t_bom_header h ON h.item_id = t.component_item_id JOIN t_bom_line l ON l.bom_id = h.bom_id JOIN t_item ci ON ci.item_id = l.component_item_id WHERE h.status = 'ACTIVE' AND h.is_default = 'Y' AND h.effective_from <= (SELECT curr_biz_date FROM t_business_date WHERE sys_code = 'CORE') AND (h.effective_to IS NULL OR h.effective_to >= (SELECT curr_biz_date FROM t_business_date WHERE sys_code = 'CORE')) AND t.lvl < 20 ) SELECT lvl, parent_item_id, component_item_id, component_code, component_name, item_type, qty_per, cum_qty, uom, path, is_phantom FROM bom_tree ORDER BY path

SELECT bom_id, item_id, bom_version, base_qty, base_uom, status, is_default, effective_from, effective_to FROM ( SELECT bom_id, item_id, bom_version, base_qty, base_uom, status, is_default, effective_from, effective_to FROM t_bom_header WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_default = 'Y' AND effective_from <= #{asOf} AND (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to >= #{asOf}) ORDER BY effective_from DESC ) LIMIT 1
SELECT 0 AS lvl, 0 AS parent_item_id, 0 AS component_item_id, '' AS component_code, '' AS component_name, '' AS item_type, 0 AS qty_per, 0 AS cum_qty, '' AS uom, '' AS is_phantom WHERE 1 = 0
